name: Rodex Fasteners Corp.
summary: Rodex Fasteners Corp. manufactures and sells stainless steel wires and precision made screws worldwide. The company offers stainless steel wires, tapping screws, chipboard screws, machine screws, self-drilling screws, socket cap screws, socket set screws, stainless steel blind rivets, stainless steel thread cutting screws, triangular thread screws, wood screws, high-low thread screws, coarse thread screws, drywall screws, security screws, washer assembly of sems, screws for automatic line, electronic screws, JIS screws, special screws, hexagon nuts, and hexagon nylon lock nuts. Rodex Fasteners Corp. was founded in 1984 and is based in Chungli, Taiwan.
